title: lindsaea regularis
intro: Lindsaea regularis is a species of fern, commonly known as the regular fishbone fern, belonging to the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lindsaea regularis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce inflammation and protect the body from oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often consumed to alleviate symptoms of the mentioned health issues.
